description: Letter from the judge Eliyyahu, in the Sinai desert, to his son the physician Abū Zikri, in Jerusalem. Eliyyahu admonishes him to live in peace with his younger brother and to attend to various other matters. (Information from Goitein's index card) EMS and VMR
description_he: מכתב מהשופט אליהו, במדבר סיני, לבנו הרופא אבו זכרי בירושלים, בעניין שלום עם אחיו הצעיר.
